BillingChangePostToPreBlb.billingMethod: Billing method. Only default value "BySpec" is currently supported.
BillingChangePostToPreBlb.performanceLevel: Performance specification. Leave empty to skip configuration change. Values: "small1" Standard 1, "small2" Standard 2, "medium1" Enhanced 1, "medium2" Enhanced 2, "large1" Ultra-large 1, "large2" Ultra-large 2, "large3" Ultra-large 3. Note: prepaid does not support "unlimited" (no speed limit).
